overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage of a character in a dark coat standing in tall grass at night, facing a large twisted tree stump in a foggy forest. The atmospheric scene features a full moon, mist, distant orange lights, and flying birds.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest clearing with monumental twisted dead tree

agents.ego_description: standing motionless in tall grass, facing a distant twisted tree structure while observing the foggy surroundings

entered.detail: large gnarled dead tree stump with twisted branches silhouetted against the moonlit sky
dense tall grass surrounding the character, swaying slightly in the wind
leafless tree with twisted branches framing the left side of the view
dark pine tree forming the right boundary of the clearing
faint warm lights glowing near the base of the twisted tree, suggesting a camp or settlement

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dense foggy forest at night, surrounded by tall grass and facing a massive twisted tree stump in the distance. The moon illuminates the misty scene through patchy clouds, with distant orange lights glowing near the tree base. Bare branches and evergreen trees frame the clearing while birds fly through the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze across a haunting, moonlit forest clearing centered on a massive, twisted tree stump. It begins with the character standing amidst tall grass, where dense fog clings to the ground and obscures the surrounding evergreen trees. As the camera lingers, the moonlight filters through patchy clouds to illuminate the misty air, while birds drift across the dark sky above. The scene then draws focus toward the distant base of the stump, where mysterious orange lights glow through the haze, framing the desolate landscape in an eerie, atmospheric light.
